## Maintenance Task Description
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task.

## Task Type
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Dependency updates
- [ ] Documentation updates
- [ ] Performance optimization
- [ ] Technical debt reduction
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Reason for Maintenance
Why is this maintenance task needed?

## Affected Areas
Which parts of the codebase will be affected?
- Area 1
- Area 2
- Area 3

## Expected Outcome
What should be the result of this maintenance task?

## Priority
- [ ] Low - Can be done anytime
- [ ] Medium - Should be done soon
- [ ] High - Should be prioritized

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the maintenance task here.
